title: sphaeralcea ambigua
intro: Sphaeralcea ambigua, also known as the desert marigold, is a perennial wildflower that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its roots, leaves, and flowers. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea ambigua include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular herb in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Sphaeralcea ambigua include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
